description: Rename the field 'calendar' in class org.apache.commons.lang3.time.CalendarUtils to 'wrappedCalendar'. Update all references.

Rename ONLY the three-argument overload 'replace(String text, String searchString, String replacement)' in class org.apache.commons.lang3.StringUtils to 'replaceSimple'. Do not rename the other replace overloads (e.g. the four-argument one with int max). Update all callers of the three-argument overload.

validation.note: Overload disambiguation: the other replace overloads (replace(...,int max), replace ignore-case, etc.) must keep the name 'replace'. A word-level text substitution of 'replace' also corrupts java.lang.String#replace calls and fails to compile.

description: Rename the method 'contains(int[] array, int valueToFind)' in class org.apache.commons.lang3.ArrayUtils to 'containsValue'. A method named 'contains' also exists on org.apache.commons.lang3.StringUtils; that one must NOT be renamed. Update all callers of ArrayUtils.contains(int[], int).

validation.note: Cross-class collision: StringUtils.contains and other ArrayUtils.contains overloads must keep the name 'contains'. A word-level substitution of 'contains' also corrupts JDK calls (List#contains, String#contains) and fails to compile.
